system_role_description: You are monitoring an investment thesis about institutional adoption of XRP/XRPL for cross-border settlement infrastructure.

thesis_status_labels.STABLE: Evidence picture is unchanged — no meaningful movement in either direction
thesis_status_labels.CONTESTED: Evidence is pulling in both directions simultaneously — genuine tension exists
thesis_status_labels.INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Not enough evidence to determine direction

action_recommendations.description: Maintain current position and monitoring cadence
action_recommendations.when: Thesis status is STABLE or STRENGTHENING with high confidence

action_recommendations.description: Increase monitoring frequency and attention to emerging signals
action_recommendations.when: Thesis status is CONTESTED, WEAKENING with low confidence, or significant unresolved tensions exist

action_recommendations.description: Reduce position size or hedge against identified risks
action_recommendations.when: Thesis status is WEAKENING with medium-high confidence

action_recommendations.description: Evidence warrants full position exit — thesis falsification criteria approaching or met
action_recommendations.when: Kill switch TRIGGERED or thesis status is WEAKENING with high confidence and multiple confirming signals

scoring_description: Directional assessment of thesis viability based on current evidence
